base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_mother_brain_bg — a tile from 1986 metroid. Mother Brain — giant brain in jar. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mother Brain — giant brain in jar; BG-Graphics tier (part of room background). Surrounded by Zebetites and Rinkas; shoot brain directly to damage
